summary: The stock market had a wild Tuesday, skidding but also coming off lows on AI fears and Trump's Iran threats. CPI inflation is on tap.

headline: Oracle Is Reshaping Its Earnings. The Cloud Is How.
summary: Oracle  reports fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday afternoon as it continues to disrupt its own legacy software business with cloud software and services.  Wall Street analysts are expecting the company to report $1.96 in adjusted earnings per share, up from $1.70 the year before.  With sales of its mature business software stalled, in 2019 Oracle began running the  Microsoft  cloud-pivot playbook.

content.title: Oracle Is Reshaping Its Earnings. The Cloud Is How.
content.summary: Oracle  reports fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday afternoon as it continues to disrupt its own legacy software business with cloud software and services.  Wall Street analysts are expecting the company to report $1.96 in adjusted earnings per share, up from $1.70 the year before.  With sales of its mature business software stalled, in 2019 Oracle began running the  Microsoft  cloud-pivot playbook.

headline: LEAP Consulting Group Reports Accelerating Demand for Enterprise ERP and Governance, Risk & Compliance Services
summary: ELMWOOD PARK, N.J., June 10, 2026--LEAP Consulting Group, a technology advisory and delivery firm specializing in regulated industries, today announced accelerating demand across two interconnected practice areas: Enterprise ERP and Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC). The firm is seeing sustained growth from large corporate enterprises and regulated-industry organizations requiring a single partner capable of modernizing financial infrastructure and sustaining audit readiness simultaneously.

content.title: LEAP Consulting Group Reports Accelerating Demand for Enterprise ERP and Governance, Risk & Compliance Services
content.summary: ELMWOOD PARK, N.J., June 10, 2026--LEAP Consulting Group, a technology advisory and delivery firm specializing in regulated industries, today announced accelerating demand across two interconnected practice areas: Enterprise ERP and Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC). The firm is seeing sustained growth from large corporate enterprises and regulated-industry organizations requiring a single partner capable of modernizing financial infrastructure and sustaining audit readiness simultaneously.

headline: Crusoe campus delay not a sign of AI demand weakness: Analyst
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence-related stocks remained under pressure this week as investors grappled with concerns about AI infrastructure spending, but one analyst argues that the market may be misinterpreting the significance of a high-profile project delay.

content.title: Crusoe campus delay not a sign of AI demand weakness: Analyst
content.summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence-related stocks remained under pressure this week as investors grappled with concerns about AI infrastructure spending, but one analyst argues that the market may be misinterpreting the significance of a high-profile project delay.

headline: How Will Adobe Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
summary: Adobe (NASDAQ: ADBE) is set to report its earnings on Thursday, June 11, 2026. Heading into the results, the stock has experienced notable pressure, dropping roughly 8% over the past five days as investors heavily scrutinize the company's ability to successfully monetize its generative AI tools.
